description: Vertical designed poster from The White House. The top banner reads 'AMERICAN MANUFACTURING' in gold/amber serif capitals over a dark red, slightly distressed stripe, with 'IS BACK!' set large in white italic serif underneath. The central image is a color photograph shot from behind: a man in a navy blue suit with blond hair (Donald Trump), seen from the back, stands with three workers wearing orange flame-resistant coveralls and white hard hats inside a dimly lit factory or shipyard; the workers are smiling. Overlaid at the bottom is a white statistics card titled 'Four Straight Months of Manufacturing Expansion' showing a bar chart of a manufacturing index from Apr. 2023 through Apr. 2026, with earlier bars in blue/navy and the most recent four months rising in red (peaking around 52 to 53), captioned 'Source: ISM Manufacturing PMI Report.' A small White House wordmark and seal ('The WHITE HOUSE') sit at the bottom. The palette is red, white, and blue.
notable_text: AMERICAN MANUFACTURING IS BACK! / Four Straight Months of Manufacturing Expansion / The WHITE HOUSE
